projects.name: Hyper-V-GPU-Paravirtualization-Manager
projects.description: Hyper-V GPU Paravirtualization Manager is a PowerShell automation toolkit for Windows 10/11 that streamlines GPU-PV setup in Hyper-V VMs with per-adapter partitioning, multi-GPU support, cross-vendor driver detection (NVIDIA/AMD/Intel), and selective driver injection for gaming, development, and ML workloads.
